name: superzej-acp-extension
description: superzej's ACP bridge extension for the pi coding agent. Loaded via `pi --extension superzej-acp.ts`; pi (>=0.80) bundles BOTH deps below (@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent + typebox) and resolves them for the extension at load time, so NO install is required to run. These are declared only for editor type-checking / standalone tooling. Keep the versions matched to the installed pi.
